hero.title: Contact
hero.label: Contact
hero.intro: Collectors, sellers, traders, and researchers are welcome to get in touch about New York transportation tokens, related exonumia, and pieces that may deserve more documentation.

profile.heading: About Keith
profile.name: Keith Baron
profile.bio: Independent collector and software developer with a particular interest in New York City transportation tokens, undocumented varieties, and historical research.

sections.title: Buying, Selling, or Trading
body: I am especially interested in New York City transportation tokens, unlisted or undocumented pieces, errors, oddities, counterfeits, unusual varieties, and related exonumia with useful collector or historical context.
No collection is too big, or too small. I buy single pieces or entire collections.

sections.title: Research and Corrections
body: Corrections, attributions, discoveries, provenance notes, and additional information are always appreciated. If you can help identify a token, clarify a variety, or improve a listing, please send the details along.

relatedPages.description: Learn more about the collection and site goals.

relatedPages.description: View duplicate transportation tokens available for sale or trade.
